channel.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L121B09 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 28, 07:00 - 09:00 UTC

Apr 30, 22:20 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 28/05/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 09:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.description:

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A09 - W17A10 - W17A11 - W17A14 - W17B08 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 19, 06:00 - 10:00 UTC

Apr 23, 14:13 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer.

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A09
- Rack W17A10
- Rack W17A11
- Rack W17A14
- Rack W17B08

Start time : 19/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 19/05/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX2][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 23A06 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 17, 23:00 UTC  -  May 18, 01:00 UTC

May 1, 19:33 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure for rack 23A06.

Start time : 17/05/2026 23:00 UTC
End time : 18/05/2026 01:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in rack 23A06 will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX7][Storage and Backups] - Backup Storage maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 7, 14:00 UTC  -  May 8, 02:00 UTC

May 4, 08:53 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our Backup Storage offer.

Start time : 07/05/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 08/05/2026 02:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, some storage will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 30 minutes.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Backup Storage offering to implement security and performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks T01B24/T01B25 migration notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 7, 02:00 - 10:00 UTC

Apr 28, 20:42 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a migration in the racks T01B24/T01B25 to T01B26.

Start time : 07/05/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 07/05/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in racks T01B24/T01B25 will be unavailable during maintenance for 8 hours.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a migration on our infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack T01B24 migration notification

THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 7, 02:00 - 10:00 UTC

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA2][Cooling System] - Rack G233A17 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 6, 06:00 - 14:30 UTC

May 4, 12:19 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 06/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 06/05/2026 14:30 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [ERI][Network] - Rack E103C07 maintenance notification
item.description:
May 5, 00:28 UTC
Completed - We would like to inform you that the maintenance on our network is now completed.
All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

May 4, 23:30 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 16, 18:27 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 04/05/2026 23:30 UTC
End time : 05/05/2026 01:30 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance, the public network will be unavailable for 10 minutes, after which the vRack network will be unavailable for 10 minutes for the servers in the rack.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will have to carry out interventions on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX6/7][Storage and Backups] - Backup Storage maintenance notification
item.description:
May 4, 22:31 UTC
Completed - We would like to inform you that the maintenance on our Backup Storage is now completed.
All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

May 4, 14:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 4, 07:55 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our Backup Storage offer.

Start time : 04/05/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 05/05/2026 02:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, some storage will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 30 minutes.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Backup Storage offering to implement security and performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA6][Virtual Private Servers] - VPS Incident Notification
item.description:
May 4, 15:14 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Virtual Private Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 04/05/2026 06:31 UTC
End time : 04/05/2026 15:13 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected infrastructure failure.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 4, 10:46 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Our technical team continues to work on the incident.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 4, 07:23 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Virtual Private Servers offer in GRA6 Region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 04/05/2026 06:31 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some Virtual Private Servers are temporarily unavailable in GRA6 Region.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their Virtual Private Servers in the specified region.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected infrastructure failure.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [SBG5][Dedicated Servers] - Rack SBG0504A06C incident notification
item.description:
May 4, 13:01 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 30/04/2026 06:24 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 17:10 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 30, 18:34 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 30/04/2026 17:10 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 30/04/2026 06:24 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack SBG0504A06C were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 30, 17:52 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack SBG0504A06C.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 30/04/2026 06:24 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack SBG0504A06C are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located in W01A07.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Backup Storage offering to implement security and performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 46L02 incident notification
item.description:
May 4, 01:12 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering on rack 46L02 has been resolved.

Start time : 03/05/2026 23:29 UTC
End time : 04/05/2026 01:10 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 3, 23:33 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the rack 46L02.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/05/2026 23:29 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack 46L02 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 46L02 incident notification
item.description:
May 3, 22:54 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering on rack 46L02 has been resolved.

Start time : 03/05/2026 21:56 UTC
End time : 03/05/2026 22:51 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 3, 22:07 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the rack 46L02.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/05/2026 21:56 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack 46L02 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [LIM][Virtual Private Servers] - VPS incident notification
item.description:
May 3, 20:13 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 02/05/2026 12:18 UTC
End time : 03/05/2026 19:58 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected infrastructure failure

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 3, 03:09 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Most Virtual Private Servers instances are now operational again.
Ongoing Actions : Our team is working to fix the last remaining Virtual Private Servers instances.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 2, 16:17 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Virtual Private Servers offer on the specific LIM region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 02/05/2026 12:18 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some VPS instances in the LIM region are unreachable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access and use their VPS instances in the LIM region.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected infrastructure failure
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
